title: Protein binder purification in bacteria
author: Pascoa, Tomas
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: This protocol is used to purify the protein binders (nanobodies, sybodies, sFABs, etc) cloned into pBXNP_1xFLAG-His from periplasm of MC1061 bacteria.
steps_raw: This protocol is used to purify the protein binders (nanobodies, sybodies, sFABs, etc) cloned into pBXNP_1xFLAG-His from periplasm of MC1061 bacteria.
